news-global-econ.title: Death of great-grandmother brutally killed on train triggers federal action
news-global-econ.description: Transportation Secretary Duffy says FTA is reviewing MARTA's safety plans and security spending after the alleged stabbing death of a great-grandmother.

news-global-econ.title: Ukraine launches what appears to be one of its largest drone attacks against Russia: report
news-global-econ.description: Ukraine launched a massive drone attack against Russia as the brutal, years-long war between the two European countries continues to drag on.

news-global-econ.title: $600 million worth of heroin, meth and other seized drugs set on fire in Burma
news-global-econ.description: Burma destroyed over 50 tons of narcotics worth $600 million to mark the United Nations' International Day Against Drug Abuse and Illicit Trafficking.

news-global-econ.title: Report: OpenAI May Delay IPO Plans Until Next Year Due to Market Uncertainty
news-global-econ.description:
OpenAI is leaning toward postponing its IPO until next year, according to three people involved in the company's deliberations, marking a significant shift in strategy for the AI powerhouse.

news-global-econ.title: Socialists sweep NYC as Americans balk at movement’s brutal catch: ‘Talk to immigrants’
news-global-econ.description: Socialist candidates swept New York Democratic primaries as Trump rally attendees told Fox News Digital socialism leads to economic decline and disaster.

news-global-soc.title: ABC's Hostin: Trump Has Dropped 'Our Standing in the World,' He's Embarrassing
news-global-soc.description:
Friday on ABC's "The View," co-host Sunny Hostin said President Donald Trump has caused the United States "standing in the world" to drop.
The post ABC’s Hostin: Trump Has Dropped ‘Our Standing in the World,’ He’s Embarrassing appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-soc.description:
Teletubbies were seen dancing for LGBTQ+ rights at a beach Pride party, hosted by Canva, at the 2026 Cannes Lions International Festival of Creativity. The colorful foursome reportedly left the event with "their groupies chasing after them."

news-global-soc.title: New high-tech jacket pulls drinking water from thin air, researchers say
news-global-soc.description: Engineers at the University of Texas have developed a jacket that converts water vapor from air into drinking water using sunlight, producing 14 to 30 ounces daily.
